clinician.sealText: City Care Hospital | Reg. No. CCH-2026

investigations: CBC: leukocytosis on admission, improving by discharge
sources.hospitalCourse: Patient was treated with IV antibiotics, antipyretics, nebulization, and supportive care. Symptoms improved and oxygen saturation remained stable on room air before discharge.
followUpAdvice: Return immediately for breathlessness, persistent fever, chest pain, or worsening cough
